creator: shivaram.u@quadstor.com
text:
Hi jkois,

Quadstor systems isn't an ISP provider. We provide software products 
towards data storage. Our primary product is a storage virtualization 
product for FreeBSD (Thin provisioning, Data deduplication etc). 
Formerly we provided VTL software on FreeBSD. We do not provide services 
such as web hosting etc.

Apologies if my PR description is misleading. But we are hoping to make 
the list of Commercial Vendors -> Software.

Regards,
Shivaram
